name: settlement-ledger
description: Settles the group on-chain (settle), records an immutable result (group, amounts, timestamp, hash) and allows public history queries via blockchain events.

functions.settleAndRecord: settles the group and records the settlement
functions.queryHistory: queries the settlement history by reading on-chain events

inputs.wallet: ethers.Wallet — signer that triggers the settlement

outputs.record: object — { group, splitId, txHash, totalTransferred, timestamp, isoDate }
outputs.history: array — settlements read from the blockchain (queryHistory)
